title: Wraith (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wraith''' may refer to:
*The [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] species (colloquially referred to as '''Wraiths''').
*A specific [[Niles Ferrier's wraith|Wraith who worked for Niles Ferrier]].
*[[Wraith Squadron]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] commando unit and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]].
*A [[Wraith (Death Watch)|Wraith]] in the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]].
*[[Jigger Wraith]], a bounty hunter active in the years after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
*A [[space wraith]], a parasitic creature.
*[[The Wraith]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agent operating in the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
*The [[Wraith (pirates)|Wraith]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], who were seen attacking [[Tinoon Station]].
*A [[Kivan]] wraith, shadow wraiths of their former [[Species/Legends|species]], the Kivans.
*A [[Dark Side wraith]], a specter of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] energy.
*A [[Force Wraith]], a nonsentient dark side Force construct.
*[[Zora]], a [[Havoc Squad]] member who went by the codename: "Wraith".

{{Disambig}}
